task_completion.description: Replace all instances of '[Company Name]' with 'MedTech Solutions'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'MedTech Solutions' is visible in the document body where the company name should be, and there are no visible instances of the placeholder '[Company Name]'.

task_completion.description: Apply the 'Title' style to '2026 Employee Handbook' and ensure it is followed by a page break.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '2026 Employee Handbook' is formatted with a large Title font at the beginning of the document, and the rest of the content is pushed to the next page (Page 2).

task_completion.description: Include an automated Table of Contents on its own page (Page 2).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A generated Table of Contents block is visible on the second page, listing the headings and their corresponding page numbers. It should look like an inserted field, not manually typed text.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' style to the five main chapter titles and 'Heading 2' style to the seven sub-sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specified main chapter titles (e.g., '1.0 Welcome and Introduction') appear in a distinct Heading 1 style, and sub-sections (e.g., '1.1 Core Values') appear in a Heading 2 style. This can also be verified if they correctly populate the automated Table of Contents or the Navigation pane.

task_completion.description: Ensure every Heading 1 starts on a new page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main chapter titles (Heading 1) are positioned at the very top of new pages, with page breaks preceding them.

task_completion.description: Add a document header with the text 'MedTech Solutions Employee Handbook'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'MedTech Solutions Employee Handbook' is visible in the top margin (header area) of the document pages.

task_completion.description: Save the final formatted document to ~/Documents/results/employee_handbook_final.docx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word processor window shows the file name as 'employee_handbook_final.docx' in the title bar, or a file manager/terminal shows the file successfully saved in the ~/Documents/results/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the document open in an application like LibreOffice Writer or Microsoft Word, rather than the agent just using terminal commands or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents is an automated element, not manually typed text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The TOC has the characteristic gray background/field shading or formatting of an inserted TOC, rather than plain typed text with manual dot leaders.

integrity.description: Styles were applied using the word processor's style menu.
integrity.visual_evidence: The style dropdown or sidebar shows 'Heading 1', 'Heading 2', or 'Title' selected when the cursor is on the respective text, rather than just manually changing the font size and making it bold.
